content_body:
Had a great time in this beautiful cabin. Clean and comfortable for a family of 4. Only set back is not being directly on the lake, but the views and proximity to the boat ramp more than make up for it. 

(located in the heart of the Aska Adventure Area, close to Downtown Blue Ridge, hiking trails, waterfalls, tubing, kayaking, and fly-fishing....public boat ramp 1/4 mile away)
title: Great Luxury Cabin in a Great Location
